meta.update_notes: 8 June 2026: Full intelligence refresh ALL accounts. Sources: Salesforce, Gmail, Gong, web news, ZoomInfo. Gong pipeline risk alert: 47% of $1.75M pipeline at risk (8 deals). CLOSURES: Carwow (Alex Foster confirmed no POC 2 June), JLR (Pav Bharath confirmed not moving forward 1 June), Mercedes UK (wrong use case — not CC AI). CANCELLATION: UKPN June 3 demo cancelled by storm — rescheduling to Thursday. NEW INTEL: HL new CEO Matt Benchener joining Jul 2026. UKPN Alex Williams confirmed rescheduling. FBD Paul Murphy still silent (3 emails). Fractalia demo attempted May 26 in Spanish. Sainsbury's CA sent today. Hyperoptic Colin Miles sent CC data to Mark. Simply Business onsite postponed Sep/Oct. Utilita ghosting 14+ days.
meta.how_to_apply: Replace matching account objects in accounts.json by 'id' field. Apply account_patches to update specific fields on existing accounts. JLR and Fractalia are new account records to add. Commit: '8 Jun 2026 — full territory intelligence refresh'

updated_accounts.name: Sainsbury's Group
updated_accounts.quick_context: UK's second-largest grocer. 12M CC interactions annually across all brands. CA email sent to Kieran McLoughlin and Viswa Settipalli today (8 June 2026) — proceeding to CA ahead of potential POC per in-person meeting 3 June. Mark Meghezzi exec intro to Rob Barnes (CTO) + James Leech completed May 13. Andy Sykes (Dir of CS & Contact, joined Mar 2025) = operational decision-maker not yet properly engaged by AE — visited Concentrix Kolkata. Mark Given (CTMDO) confirmed leaving July 1 — 3-year plans being finalised NOW. Accenture (Ashish Sharma, Sanjay) involved — softer dependency than originally thought. NDA: Cresta will provide. Genesys + Salesforce stack confirmed. 100% QM is #1 pain ('200 of 10,000 calls — drop in the ocean').
updated_accounts.next_step: CA process live — Kieran and Viswa received CA email today. Before 12 June: (1) agree CA scope and timeline with Kieran/Viswa, (2) confirm who owns CA during Marcus holiday 12–21 June, (3) direct outreach to Andy Sykes — Concentrix BPO angle: 'agent quality decline as tenured in-house agents replaced by BPO is exactly what Cresta closes', (4) consider Mark Meghezzi exec note to Rob Barnes this week.
updated_accounts.group_structure: J Sainsbury plc (LSE: SBRY) → Sainsbury's Grocery (1,107+ stores, 461 Argos concessions) → Argos (664 locations) → Sainsbury's Bank (exiting core banking) → Nectar (loyalty, 5M+ active users) → Tu Clothing → Habitat. 12 million interactions annually across multiple brands and channels.
updated_accounts.financials: FY2024/25: Revenue £33.3bn (+1.5% YoY) · Operating Profit £1,036m (+7.2%) · EBITDA £2,192m · 'Next Level Sainsbury's' 3-year strategy being finalised now. 12M CC interactions annually.

inferred: Concentrix (BPO partner, Kolkata — confirmed Andy Sykes visited site)

ai_initiatives.title: 5-Year Microsoft Azure AI Partnership (May 2024)
ai_initiatives.detail: Sainsbury's and Microsoft announced a 5-year strategic AI partnership. Scope: AI-guided colleague tools, personalised promotions via Nectar, enhanced online search, AI-powered forecasting. CTO Clodagh Moriarty (now Rob Barnes): 'accelerate our ambition to become the UK's leading AI-enabled grocer.'
ai_initiatives.source: J Sainsbury plc press release, May 16 2024
ai_initiatives.cresta_angle: Azure AI partnership = senior exec mandate. Cresta runs on Azure. Frame as: 'Extending the Microsoft AI partnership into the contact centre — the one area Azure hasn't yet touched.'

ai_initiatives.title: No CC AI initiative — complete whitespace
ai_initiatives.detail: Despite the Microsoft partnership, no AI agent coaching, real-time assist, or automated QM in the Sainsbury's CC. Kieran confirmed manual QA only (200 of 10,000 calls reviewed). The Microsoft investment has not reached the contact centre.
ai_initiatives.cresta_angle: 'You've invested in Microsoft AI across your business — here is what it looks like in the contact centre.'

recent_news.headline: CA scoping email sent to Kieran McLoughlin and Viswa Settipalli
recent_news.detail: Marcus sent the Conversational Assessment email to Kieran and Viswa. Mark Meghezzi amended wording and added that Cresta will provide NDA rather than asking Sainsbury's to choose. Internal thread: Amy Koh, Hala Agha, James Russell, Anna Hettwer.
recent_news.cresta_relevance: CA is live. Most advanced commercial commitment on the account. Manage continuity during Marcus holiday carefully — agree handover before 12 June.

recent_news.headline: In-person product meeting — proceeding to CA

recent_news.cresta_relevance: Strongest commercial signal to date. CA is the agreed next step.

recent_news.headline: 3-year plans finalising end of Q2 — Viswa update
recent_news.detail: SFDC: 'Viswa updated that they are looking at end of Q2 for when their 3-year plans will be finalised.' This is now.
recent_news.cresta_relevance: Decision window is open right now. CA timing is ideal.

recent_news.headline: Marcus engaging Accenture (Ashish Sharma) — Sainsbury's relationship active

recent_news.cresta_relevance: Accenture involvement is a potential influencer route to Rob Barnes if needed.

recent_news.headline: Brilliant demo — clear path forward with Insights
recent_news.detail: SFDC: 'Brilliant demo with Sainsburys yesterday. There is a very clear path forward with insights to start which is a burning need.' Viswa and Kieran both attended. Ops team deeper dive agreed.

AI-native for CC vs Agentforce (CRM extended). Forrester Wave Leader. 100% QM = the one thing Agentforce can't deliver. Agent quality decline as Concentrix replaces tenured agents = testable pain Cresta solves.

updated_accounts.best_case_study:
★★★ Woolworths AU — Genesys + Salesforce + Cresta (IDENTICAL stack). QA automation + agent assist.
★★ Cox Communications — 20% revenue increase, 28.5% AHT reduction, 50% ramp reduction.
★★ JD Sports — retail multi-brand CC.
updated_accounts.narrative: Sainsbury's signed a 5-year Microsoft Azure AI deal in May 2024 — but that investment hasn't yet touched the contact centre. Kieran confirmed they're reviewing 200 of every 10,000 calls. That's not QA — that's a sample. Cresta sits on top of the Genesys + Salesforce stack they already own, adds the AI intelligence layer Microsoft's partnership promised, and delivers 100% QM from day one. The CA is live. Woolworths AU ran this exact stack.
updated_accounts.outreach_angle: Andy Sykes direct outreach: 'The agent quality gap between your tenured in-house team and the Concentrix BPO team in Kolkata is probably costing you service consistency you can't currently measure — because you're reviewing 200 calls in 10,000. Cresta closes that gap. Worth 20 minutes?'

The problems (agent variability, conversation visibility) won't be solved by Ada or RPA — they'll still be there in September.

gong_history.summary: Bea asked to postpone Northampton to Sep/Oct. Data sensitivity of 50k calls + team flat out with other supplier. 'An MVP would be a distraction. I am very sorry to ask this.'
SFDC: 'Good call to discuss partnership. CA being started and onsite on June 23rd.' (Onsite subsequently postponed.)
Jen confirmed Bea free Mon June 1 at 4pm. Alex Cramer joining. Northampton onsite agreed in principle.
'We are 100% aligned... the contact center is a brand differentiator in an AI world (one of our agents today was asked if she was human or a robot!)' Confirmed Northampton onsite. Looped Jen Smith.
'I understand the decision completely... the problems we were discussing won't disappear with this. They'll still be there in six months.' Requested call + Northampton onsite. Alex Cramer CC'd.

CC strategy approved + budget secured. Chose RPA vendor for Phase 1. Renewing Ada 1 year. 'We remain very impressed with Cresta — yet the high price and higher integration effort means it's not going to be a quick set up.'
CRO engaged. Alex: 'Maybe I could join that call and help understand why she believes RPA is faster savings.'
SFDC: 'Presented commercials to Bea and team which went very well. Looking at insights across 100% and a pilot for QA, Coaching and AA to start.'
SFDC: 'Great onsite with Sai and Teegen this week.'
SFDC: 'Brilliant onsite yesterday. NDA signed this week.'

open_actions_patch.action: POST-HOLIDAY: LinkedIn research to identify IKEA UK/EMEA Head of Customer Operations or CX Director. Then cold email with WISMO + assembly query complexity angle.

pentland.quick_context: Private sports/lifestyle brand portfolio (Speedo, Berghaus, Canterbury). ~57% stake in JD Sports. No warm intro. Route through JD Sports relationship only. No standalone cold outreach.
pentland.next_step: Route any Pentland approach through JD Sports relationship only. No standalone cold outreach. Low priority.

open_actions_patch.action: Route Pentland approach through JD Sports relationship only. No standalone cold outreach without warm intro from JD Sports engagement.

energia.quick_context: Irish dual-brand energy (Energia ROI + Power NI). Salesforce CRM confirmed — immediate integration story. iCON Infrastructure (PE-backed). Phillip Paterson (Group CIO) = primary target. Marcus's Irish background = peer advantage. Open opportunity in SFDC. CC footprint unknown — qualifying call needed.
energia.next_step: Post-holiday: email Phillip Paterson (Group CIO) — Salesforce integration angle + Irish peer tone. 'You already have Salesforce — Cresta is the intelligence layer that makes every customer conversation visible, scoreable, and improvable.'

open_actions_patch.action: POST-HOLIDAY: Email Phillip Paterson (Group CIO) — Salesforce integration angle + Irish peer tone. Short and direct. Qualify CC footprint in the first call.

staysure.quick_context: Over-50s travel insurance specialist (Northampton). 8x8 + Zendesk + Salesforce + Freespee (call analytics) confirmed. No executive identified. FCA Consumer Duty applies. Pre-existing medical conditions = very high specialist knowledge burden per agent. Freespee in stack = they already care about call quality data. Low priority.
staysure.next_step: LinkedIn research to identify CEO/COO/Head of Operations. Then cold email with over-50s pre-existing conditions + FCA Consumer Duty framing. Post-holiday.

open_actions_patch.action: POST-HOLIDAY: LinkedIn research to identify Staysure CEO/COO. Then cold email: over-50s + pre-existing conditions + FCA Consumer Duty. Reference Freespee in stack as evidence they care about call quality.

manchester-united.quick_context: Sports/entertainment. 8x8 + Salesforce + Qualtrics. INEOS ownership (Berrada CEO, Roche COO). Collette Roche (COO, ex-Manchester Airport MD) = best entry — airport CC experience directly transferable. Non-traditional account — lower ACV. C priority. No outbound activity yet.
manchester-united.next_step: Post-holiday: cold email Collette Roche (COO) — fan services + premium hospitality angle. Reference Manchester Airport background. Very short.

open_actions_patch.action: POST-HOLIDAY: Cold email Collette Roche (COO) — Manchester Airport reference + fan services premium hospitality angle. Very short: 'You turned Manchester Airport into a best-in-class service operation. MUFC has a similar challenge. Worth 20 minutes?'

new_accounts.name: Jaguar Land Rover
new_accounts.quick_context: CLOSED — Pav Bharath (Modern Luxury Experience Manager) emailed 1 June 2026: 'We have carefully reviewed our current priorities... we have decided not to move forward and will place any further discussions on hold for now.' Demo June 1 (remote) with Anna Kemp, Pav Bharath, Costa Delis went well — Anna: 'the AI Analyst section clearly resonated.' JLR citing existing technology transformation + similar tools already signed up. Marcus proposed follow-up (Jun 11) + onsite at Whitley (Jun 24/25) immediately after demo — all declined.
new_accounts.next_step: CLOSED. Close in Salesforce as Closed Lost. Set calendar reminder Oct 2026 for light-touch reconnect with Costa Delis once JLR's technology transformation settles.
new_accounts.key_quote: 'We have decided not to move forward and will place any further discussions on hold for now.' — Pav Bharath, Jun 1 '26

gong_history.summary: JLR formally declined to move forward. 'We have carefully reviewed our current priorities. Set calendar reminder October 2026 — light-touch reconnect with Costa Delis once JLR technology transformation settles.

new_accounts.name: Fractalia
new_accounts.quick_context: Spanish IT services / managed services company. Partner channel via Five9 + Nuveto. Daniel Diaz (Nuveto) = primary partner contact. Feliciano confirmed Fractalia availability for demo Tuesday 26 May at 15:30 CET. CRITICAL: Customer is NOT a fluent English speaker — demo must be in Spanish. Five9 partner Jose Augusto confirmed. Cresta opening Madrid office in June 2026 = local presence advantage. Amy Koh briefed.
new_accounts.next_step: Confirm whether May 26 demo happened. If yes, follow up via Daniel Diaz in Spanish. If no, reschedule. All future sessions must be in Spanish. Madrid office opening June 2026 = key relationship anchor for Spanish accounts.
new_accounts.key_quote: 'Customer is not a fluent English speaker — if the demo can be in Spanish I think they will get more details of the Cresta solution.' — Feliciano (Five9/Nuveto), May 2026

gong_history.contact: Feliciano (Five9/Nuveto) + Daniel Diaz + Jose Augusto (Five9) + Amy Koh + Marcus

Customer is not a fluent English speaker — if the demo can be in Spanish I think they will get more details. Please confirm your availability.' All future Fractalia sessions must be in Spanish. Identify a Spanish-speaking SE or partner resource for demos. Cresta Madrid office June 2026 = relationship anchor.
